title: Viacha Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Viacha, with a Z-Score of -4.23. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Viacha are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) have reached 15.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. 
 The humidity level is at 75%, with a gentle breeze of 2.4 km/h, making the cold even more unbearable.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
